0.content:
# 🔴 [CLIENT_NAME] [LOCATION] — Top 5 Worst Performing Pages

**Application:** [APP_NAME] (`APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX`) | **Analysis Period:** Last 24 hours

This dashboard identifies the **5 pages with the worst combination of slow load times, high error volumes, and user impact**.
Each page is analysed by:
- **Page load performance** (avg, p90, p95)
- **Error volume & type** (first-party, third-party, JS exceptions)
- **Actionable root causes** (first-party errors the team can fix)

> ⚠️ **Key Finding:** The **/your/bookings/** page has the highest first-party error rate (26%) — directly impacting revenue conversion.

2.title: 🔴 Total Errors (Top 5 Pages)
2.query:
fetch user.events, from:now()-24h
| filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX" and characteristics.classifier == "error"
| filter in(view.detected_name, {"/your/bookings/", "/your-location/products/store/", "/your-location/products/products/", "/your-location/", "/your-location/info/hours/"})
| summarize total_errors = count()

3.title: 👤 Sessions Affected
3.query:
fetch user.events, from:now()-24h
| filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX" and characteristics.classifier == "error"
| filter in(view.detected_name, {"/your/bookings/", "/your-location/products/store/", "/your-location/products/products/", "/your-location/", "/your-location/info/hours/"})
| summarize affected_sessions = countDistinct(dt.rum.session.id)

4.title: ⏱️ Worst P90 Load Time
4.query:
fetch user.events, from:now()-24h
| filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX" and characteristics.classifier == "view_summary"
| filter in(view.detected_name, {"/your/bookings/", "/your-location/products/store/", "/your-location/products/products/", "/your-location/", "/your-location/info/hours/"})
| summarize worst_p90_ms = max(duration) / 1000000
| fieldsAdd worst_p90_s = worst_p90_ms / 1000

5.title: 🏷️ First-Party Error Rate
5.query:
fetch user.events, from:now()-24h
| filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX" and characteristics.classifier == "error"
| filter in(view.detected_name, {"/your/bookings/", "/your-location/products/store/", "/your-location/products/products/", "/your-location/", "/your-location/info/hours/"})
| summarize first_party = countIf(url.provider == "first_party"), total = count()
| fieldsAdd fp_rate = (toDouble(first_party) / toDouble(total)) * 100

6.title: 📊 Errors by Page (Top 5 Worst)
6.query:
fetch user.events, from:now()-24h
| filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX" and characteristics.classifier == "error"
| filter in(view.detected_name, {"/your/bookings/", "/your-location/products/store/", "/your-location/products/products/", "/your-location/", "/your-location/info/hours/"})
| summarize 
    error_count = count(),
    affected_sessions = countDistinct(dt.rum.session.id),
    by:{view.detected_name}
| sort error_count desc

7.title: ⏱️ Page Load Performance Comparison (P90 ms)
7.query:
fetch user.events, from:now()-24h
| filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX" and characteristics.classifier == "view_summary"
| filter in(view.detected_name, {"/your/bookings/", "/your-location/products/store/", "/your-location/products/products/", "/your-location/", "/your-location/info/hours/"})
| summarize 
    page_views = count(),
    avg_ms = avg(duration) / 1000000,
    p90_ms = percentile(duration, 90) / 1000000,
    p95_ms = percentile(duration, 95) / 1000000,
    by:{view.detected_name}
| sort p90_ms desc

9.title: 🔵 Error Type Split (1st Party vs 3rd Party vs JS)
9.query:
fetch user.events, from:now()-24h
| filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX" and characteristics.classifier == "error"
| filter in(view.detected_name, {"/your/bookings/", "/your-location/products/store/", "/your-location/products/products/", "/your-location/", "/your-location/info/hours/"})
| summarize 
    first_party = countIf(url.provider == "first_party"),
    third_party = countIf(url.provider == "third_party"),
    js_exceptions = countIf(error.type == "exception"),
    by:{view.detected_name}
| sort first_party desc

10.title: 📈 Error Trend Over Time (by Page)
10.query:
fetch user.events, from:now()-24h
| filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX" and characteristics.classifier == "error"
| filter in(view.detected_name, {"/your/bookings/", "/your-location/products/store/", "/your-location/products/products/", "/your-location/", "/your-location/info/hours/"})
| makeTimeseries errors = count(), by:{view.detected_name}, bins:24

11.title: 🍩 Error Source Distribution (All 5 Pages)

12.query: data record(a="🔴 Bookings Page Deep Dive")

13.title: 🚨 Bookings — Actionable Errors (First-Party + JS Exceptions)
13.query:
fetch user.events, from:now()-24h
| filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX" and characteristics.classifier == "error"
| filter view.detected_name == "/your/bookings/" and (url.provider == "first_party" or error.type == "exception")
| summarize 
    error_count = count(),
    affected_sessions = countDistinct(dt.rum.session.id),
    by:{error.name, error.type, error.source, url.provider}
| sort error_count desc
| limit 15

14.title: 📈 Bookings Page — Error Trend (Hourly)
14.query:
fetch user.events, from:now()-24h
| filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX" and characteristics.classifier == "error"
| filter view.detected_name == "/your/bookings/"
| fieldsAdd error_category = if(
    url.provider == "first_party", "First-Party",
    else:if(error.type == "exception", "JS Exception",
    else:"Third-Party"))
| makeTimeseries errors = count(), by:{error_category}, bins:24

16.title: 📋 Top Errors Across All 5 Worst Pages
16.query:
fetch user.events, from:now()-24h
| filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX" and characteristics.classifier == "error"
| filter in(view.detected_name, {"/your/bookings/", "/your-location/products/store/", "/your-location/products/products/", "/your-location/", "/your-location/info/hours/"})
| summarize 
    error_count = count(),
    affected_sessions = countDistinct(dt.rum.session.id),
    by:{view.detected_name, error.name, error.type, url.provider}
| sort error_count desc
| limit 25

17.title: 🏷️ Third-Party Error Domains (Noise Sources)
17.query:
fetch user.events, from:now()-24h
| filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX" and characteristics.classifier == "error" and url.provider == "third_party"
| filter in(view.detected_name, {"/your/bookings/", "/your-location/products/store/", "/your-location/products/products/", "/your-location/", "/your-location/info/hours/"})
| summarize 
    errors = count(),
    sessions = countDistinct(dt.rum.session.id),
    by:{url.domain}
| sort errors desc
| limit 10

18.content:
## 🎯 Root Cause Summary & Recommendations

### Page #1: `/your/bookings/` — **CRITICAL (Revenue Impact)**
| Metric | Value |
|--------|-------|
| P90 Load Time | **1,367 ms** |
| Avg Load Time | **735 ms** |
| Total Errors (24h) | **6,450** |
| First-Party Errors | **1,696 (26%)** — Highest of all pages |
| JS Exceptions | **1,609** |
| Sessions Affected | **1,684** |

**Root Causes:**
- 🔴 **404: loader.svg** (850 errors, 748 sessions) — Missing asset file. Fix: upload the SVG or update the reference path
- 🔴 **500: verifyMembershipAccess API** (259 errors, 79 sessions) — Backend API failure on membership verification
- 🔴 **null is not an object ('t.current.style')** (409 errors) — React ref accessed before mount. Fix: null-check in component
- 🟠 **500: /api/hotel/list** (69 errors) — Hotel listing API returning server errors
- 🟠 **401: /api/booking/reinit** (60 errors) — Session auth expiry during checkout
- 🟠 **[CheckoutPage] console errors** (94 errors) — Checkout component throwing console errors
- 🟠 **Serialiser failed** (78 errors) — Data serialisation bug in booking flow

---

### Page #2: `/your-location/products/store/` — **HIGH IMPACT (Highest Traffic)**
| Metric | Value |
|--------|-------|
| Page Views | **10,390** |
| Total Errors (24h) | **14,188** |
| First-Party Errors | **357 (2.5%)** |
| JS Exceptions | **2,140** |
| Sessions Affected | **4,446** |

**Root Causes:**
- 🟡 82% third-party ad/tracking errors (Amazon, Taboola, Google)
- 🟠 **unhandled rejection without reason** (2,070 errors from 119 sessions) — Promise rejection in ticket widget
- 🟡 First-party error rate is low — most noise is from ad networks

---

### Page #3: `/your-location/products/products/` — **JS CRASH**
| Metric | Value |
|--------|-------|
| P90 Load Time | **263 ms** |
| Total Errors (24h) | **11,806** |
| JS Exceptions | **1,405** |
| Sessions Affected | **2,951** |

**Root Causes:**
- 🔴 **products/:4185:31** (815 errors, 751 sessions) — JS exception at line 4185, crashing for 30% of visitors
- 🔴 **products/:4185:20** (157 errors, 139 sessions) — Related crash on same line
- 🟡 87% of errors are third-party ad network failures

---

### Page #4: `/your-location/` (Homepage) — **HIGH VOLUME**
| Metric | Value |
|--------|-------|
| Page Views | **8,313** |
| Avg Load Time | **94 ms** |
| Total Errors (24h) | **11,772** |
| First-Party Errors | **395 (3.4%)** |
| Sessions Affected | **4,288** |

**Root Causes:**
- 🟡 95% third-party errors (Amazon, Taboola, Google, App Insights)
- 🟢 Page load performance is good (94ms avg)
- 🟡 Error noise from ad/tracking scripts inflating numbers

---

### Page #5: `/your-location/info/hours/` — **SLOW**
| Metric | Value |
|--------|-------|
| P90 Load Time | **575 ms** |
| Avg Load Time | **447 ms** |
| Total Errors (24h) | **2,334** |
| Sessions Affected | **917** |

**Root Causes:**
- 🟠 Page load is 5x slower than homepage — likely heavy calendar/widget component
- 🟡 83% third-party errors
- 🟠 JS exceptions (398) may indicate calendar widget issues
